allow: PowerShell(Get-ChildItem -Path "C:\\Users\\USER\\Documents\\Yamin Final" -Recurse -Force | Select-Object FullName, @{Name="Size";Expression={if\($_.PSIsContainer\){"<DIR>"} else {$_.Length}}} | Format-Table -AutoSize)

PowerShell(Get-ChildItem -Path "C:\\Users\\USER\\Documents\\Yamin Final" -Force | Select-Object Name, @{Name="Type";Expression={if\($_.PSIsContainer\){"Directory"} else {"File"}}}, @{Name="Size";Expression={if\($_.PSIsContainer\){"N/A"} else {"{0:N0} bytes" -f $_.Length}}}; Write-Host "`n--- Subdirectory contents ---"; Get-ChildItem -Path "C:\\Users\\USER\\Documents\\Yamin Final\\.claude" -Force)

PowerShell(Write-Host "--- File extensions found ---"; Get-ChildItem -Path "C:\\Users\\USER\\Documents\\Yamin Final" -Recurse -Force -File | Group-Object -Property Extension | Select-Object Name, Count; Write-Host "`n--- Total directory size ---"; $totalSize = \(Get-ChildItem -Path "C:\\Users\\USER\\Documents\\Yamin Final" -Recurse -Force -File | Measure-Object -Property Length -Sum\).Sum; Write-Host "Total: $\([Math]::Round\($totalSize / 1MB, 2\)\) MB")

PowerShell(Get-ChildItem -Path "C:\\Users\\USER\\Documents\\Yamin Final" -Recurse -Force -File | Select-Object Name, Extension, @{Name="Size_MB";Expression={[Math]::Round\($_.Length / 1MB, 2\)}} | Sort-Object Name)

PowerShell($dir = "C:\\Users\\USER\\Documents\\Yamin Final"; Write-Host "=== ROOT DIRECTORY ==="; Get-ChildItem -Path $dir -Force | ForEach-Object {$size = if\($_.PSIsContainer\) {"[DIR]"} else {"{0:N0} bytes \({1:N2} MB\)" -f $_.Length, \($_.Length/1MB\)}; Write-Host "$\($_.Name\) - $size"}; Write-Host "`n=== SUBDIRECTORIES ==="; Get-ChildItem -Path $dir -Recurse -Directory -Force | ForEach-Object {Write-Host $_.FullName}; Write-Host "`n=== ALL FILES WITH PATHS ==="; Get-ChildItem -Path $dir -Recurse -File -Force | ForEach-Object {Write-Host "$\($_.Name\) - {0:N0} bytes \({1:N2} MB\)" -f $_.Length, \($_.Length/1MB\)})

PowerShell($dir = "C:\\Users\\USER\\Documents\\Yamin Final"; Write-Host "=== ROOT DIRECTORY ==="; Get-ChildItem -Path $dir -Force | ForEach-Object {$size = if\($_.PSIsContainer\) {"[DIR]"} else {"{0:N0} bytes \({1:N2} MB\)" -f $_.Length, \($_.Length/1MB\)}; "$\($_.Name\) - $size"}; Write-Host "`n=== SUBDIRECTORIES ==="; Get-ChildItem -Path $dir -Recurse -Directory -Force | ForEach-Object {$_.FullName}; Write-Host "`n=== ALL FILES ==="; Get-ChildItem -Path $dir -Recurse -File -Force | ForEach-Object {"$\($_.FullName\) - $\('{0:N0}' -f $_.Length\) bytes \($\('{0:N2}' -f \($_.Length/1MB\)\) MB\)"})
